    Services

    Global Advisory Services

    🌍

    Cross-Border Compliance

    Navigate multi-jurisdiction regulatory requirements with frameworks designed for international crypto operations, fund flows, and reporting obligations.

    📊

    Global Portfolio Allocation

    Diversified digital asset portfolios optimized across geographies, currencies, and regulatory environments to manage risk and capture global opportunities.

    🏛️

    Jurisdiction Analysis

    Detailed analysis of crypto-friendly jurisdictions including tax treatment, licensing requirements, banking access, and operational feasibility for your specific use case.

    🔐

    Institutional Custody

    Guidance on selecting and implementing institutional-grade custody solutions including multi-signature setups, insurance coverage, and geographic diversification of key storage.

    💱

    OTC Desk Access

    Facilitated access to vetted over-the-counter trading desks for large-volume transactions with competitive pricing, settlement assurance, and counterparty due diligence.

    🗺️

    Regulatory Mapping

    Comprehensive mapping of regulatory landscapes across target markets, tracking legislative developments and enforcement trends that may impact your operations.

    Profile

    About Global Crypto Advisers

    Built for International Complexity

    Global Crypto Advisers specializes in the unique challenges of operating across multiple jurisdictions. Cryptocurrency regulation varies dramatically by country, and what is permitted in one jurisdiction may be restricted in another. We help clients navigate this complexity with confidence.

    Institutional-Grade Infrastructure

    We work with leading custodians, OTC desks, and compliance platforms to ensure our clients have access to the same infrastructure used by the world's largest digital asset managers, regardless of where they are based.

    Multi-Jurisdiction Expertise

    Our advisory team maintains current knowledge of regulatory frameworks across major markets including the US, EU, UK, Singapore, Hong Kong, UAE, and Switzerland, enabling us to provide informed guidance on jurisdiction selection and compliance strategy.

    Questions

    Frequently asked questions

    Enquiries

    Connect With Our Team

    Operating internationally requires specialized guidance. Reach out to discuss how we can help you navigate the global crypto landscape.

Regulatory requirements vary by jurisdiction and are subject to change. Consult local legal counsel for jurisdiction-specific advice.
